source_note: Keeper Rulebook opposed rolls, combined rolls, melee combat, and fighting maneuvers; V1 records deterministic comparison policy for playtest logs and reports.

teamwork.source_note: Keeper Rulebook combined rolls (p.92): a teamwork combined roll uses the lead investigator's skill (the highest among the group), and each helping investigator grants one bonus die to the lead's roll, up to a maximum of two bonus dice.

special_damage_effects.source_note: Keeper Rulebook Table XVII Key (p.405-406). Defines special-damage tags appearing in weapon damage expressions (e.g. '1D6+burn', '1D3+stun').

stun.source_note: Stun: Target may not act for 1D6 rounds (or as the Keeper indicates).

burn.source_note: Burn: Target must roll Luck to avoid catching on fire. Take minimum damage on following round. Double this each round until extinguished (providing target is flammable).

plus_db.source_note: +DB: Plus damage bonus, which varies by individual.

weapon_table_markers.burst_full_auto: some automatic weapons can switch to burst or full auto; usually unavailable to civilians; prices reflect black-market

era_markers.Rare: perhaps obsolete; a fine specimen for collectors or perhaps illegal
